name: PokeBells
description: Pokemon Crystal on-chain captures — Bells ordinals. Each catch becomes two inscriptions: an opaque capture_commit plus a canonical mint NFT with the sprite rendered by the marketplace via recursive reference.

schema.capture_commit: p:pokebells + op:capture_commit — opaque receipt, returns with op:mint before the NFT is canonical
schema.mint: p:pokebells + op:mint — canonical NFT with nft_metadata.image referencing a sprite inscription, IVs/EVs/shiny revealed
schema.evolve: p:pokebells + op:evolve — appended to the original mint inscription_id, species + stats update
